rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CONCHITA SALUDES MACABEO
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. This issue was initially raised by e-mail to counsel on 04/01/2025. Courtesy reminders of the issue were e-mailed to counsel 3 more times on 04/28/2025, 06/09/2025, and 07/23/2025. 2) "Response to Probate Notes" filed on 04/02/2025 was not verified by the executor. This issue was initially raised by e-mail to counsel on 04/02/2025. Courtesy reminders of the issue were e-mailed to counsel 3 more times 04/28/2025, 06/09/2025, and 07/23/2025. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LILLIE MAE TYLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues remain unaddressed, despite the amended petition and amended DE-121 & DE-147 forms filed after the last hearing: 1) The amended DE-147 form filed on 07/31/2025 did not list petitioner's telephone number at item 2 of Acknowledgment of Receipt on page 2. 2) No proof of publication is on file. 3) Item 2 of the petition: Petitioner's name must be specified. 4) Item 2d: At least one box must be checked. 5) Item 3c must be completed. 6) Item 3d must be completed. 7) Item 3f(1) must be checked if the decedent died intestate. 8) Item 5a(2)(b): Please provide the name and date of death of the decedent's spouse. 9) Item 5a(3) or (4) must be checked. 10) Item 5a(7) or (8) must be checked. 11) Item 5b: At least one box must be checked. 12) Page 4 (last signature page) is missing from the amended petition filed on 07/31/2025. 13) Re the amended DE-121 form filed on 07/31/2025: A) The county was not specified in the caption. B) The decedent's name must be specified at item 1. C) Items 2 and 3 must be completed. D) Item 2 of the proof of service must be completed. E) The proof of service must be signed by someone other than petitioner. F) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE EVELYN AMBJORNSON TRUST DATED JUNE 29, 1988 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/22/2025. The following issues to be cleared or addressed two weeks before the hearing date: (1) Need clarification on whether there is or will be a probate proceeding for the estate of Ella Lamuth. The petition conclusively states that the petitioner is the sole beneficiary of Ella's trust; however, it does not explain why the "estate of Ella Lamuth" should or should not be considered an appropriate beneficiary. (2) Petition to identify (1) all heirs-at-law of Ella Lamuth and (2) all named executor(s) under Ella's will (including Tazuko C. Coffee). All persons must be properly noticed. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
